body:
We've briefly discussed the issues with functional that are needed almost always but might pose problems in edge cases

Examples:
- `outline: 0` to clear the default focus outline on non-interactive containers
- `overflow: scroll` on `ScrollArea.Viewport`
- `max-height: 100%` on popups in a positioner
- Other sizing and positioning styles

Options:
- Remove as much functional styles as possible and have the developer add them manually
- Render functional styles in `@layer base` so they can be overridden by any developer CSS:

```
<style>@layer base { ... }</style>
```

comments.body:
We've decided not to change functional styles presently, and have opted to just not use them as much as possible.  It's easy to remove them anyway using `style={{ [name]: undefined }}`.

`<style>` tags being rendered in the JSX seem to potentially cause issues in some areas (#2619) so we'd like to avoid it and stick with what works to date

labels.name: breaking change
labels.description: Introduces changes that are not backward compatible.

labels.name: scope: all components
labels.description: Widespread work has an impact on almost all components.

title: [all components] Functional styles
